eval-001.rationale: Iteration 001 shows all three colored points (red, blue, green) with readable labels on a single Atlantic-centered view, while the baseline orients toward Asia making the Statue of Liberty point barely visible on the globe edge.

eval-002.rationale: The baseline renders a clearly visible 3D extruded blue column with height and semi-transparent sides over Colorado, while iteration 001 shows only a flat 2D polygon with no extrusion.

eval-003.rationale: Both show a colorful US states map with random colors per state; the baseline has slightly more vibrant colors but neither displays prominent white outlines, making them roughly equivalent overall.

eval-004.rationale: Both screenshots are visually near-identical, showing a red polyline connecting LA, Denver, Chicago, and New York with labeled city points at each stop.

eval-005.rationale: Both correctly show only three airport markers with JFK in magenta and LHR/NRT hidden, but iteration 001 includes a visible label on ORD improving identifiability of the points.
